name: Green Bean Nest with Scallop Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. To make vinaigrette, combine olive oil, sherry vinegar, tarragon, savory, salt, and pepper in a covered jar. Shake well.
2. Trim the green beans and cook them in a large pot of boiling salted water until just crisp-tender. Drain and refrigerate.
3. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Saute the scallops for 1 to 2 minutes, then chill.
4. Just before serving, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice (or to taste), and chopped green onions in a bowl.
5. Toss the chilled scallops with the dressing mixture.
6. Arrange the beans in the shape of a nest on a serving dish. Place the scallops in the center. Sprinkle additional savory over the top.
